base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of intro_castle_approach_sequence — a ui from 1986 castlevania. Simon in foreground walking toward castle island on pine-treed cliff with teal sky. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: 3-frame approach sequence — Simon in foreground walking toward castle island on pine-treed cliff with teal sky; each frame shifts Simon closer to castle. Fade between levels uses this art style
